misc: Loves basketball even more than Marcus, making some fans wonder if he's a real golfer
biography: Pasi, representing Vuosaari Golf Helsinki, has carved out a distinctive niche within the Hector Trophée, marked by both a significant team triumph and a unique personal moniker. Known affectionately as "Susi-Pasi," he has graced the tournament on four separate occasions, showcasing his capabilities in this challenging pairs competition.

A highlight of Pasi's involvement is his impressive victory in the coveted Hector Trophée, a testament to his prowess in the demanding team format. This championship win underscores his ability to perform under pressure and contribute decisively to a winning partnership. However, despite this team success, the individual Victor Trophy, recognizing the tournament's best solitary performer, has yet to be added to his accolades. Intriguingly, Pasi harbors a profound affection for basketball, a passion so intense that some observers playfully suggest it rivals, or even surpasses, his dedication to golf, leaving fans to ponder the true extent of his commitment to the fairways.

While Pasi remains an active and respected figure within the broader Hector events community, it has been confirmed that he will not be among the competitors for the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. His continued presence in the series, albeit with this temporary hiatus, signals a potential return in future editions, where his unique blend of competitive spirit and external interests will undoubtedly continue to captivate.
